name: A Cleaning Story
author: Poki
description: A Cleaning Story is a simulation game where you get to scrub, soap, and wash carpets until they sparkle! Hunt down stubborn stains and mold, brush every corner, and reveal the adorable designs hiding underneath, whether it’s fluffy bunnies or hilarious brainrot characters. Every clean feels so satisfying! Grab your brush and start your cleaning adventure today! How to play A Cleaning Story? Click or tap to make the choice. Click and hold to move your tools. Who created A Cleaning Story? A Cleaning Story is created by AJ Ordaz. Play their other games on Poki: A Pretty Odd Bunny , Nekopirate , Nekopirate: Quest for Gold! , A Pretty Odd Bunny: Roast it! , cannon-blast, Ranch UFO , La Petite Avril , and Lidle Legend ! How can I play A Cleaning Story for free? You can play A Cleaning Story for free on Poki. Can I play A Cleaning Story on mobile devices and desktop? A Cleaning Story can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
